hooks.prompt:
Run: git diff HEAD -- src/

If the output is empty, do nothing and stop.

If there are changes:
1. Read backend_final.md to understand the current API contract.
2. Look at the diff and identify anything that affects the backend — new or changed API calls, changed request/response shapes, new Supabase operations, new endpoints needed. Ignore pure UI/styling changes.
3. If you find backend-relevant changes, overwrite backend.md (create it if it does not exist, replace all content if it does) with ONLY the following — no other text:

## Backend changes needed — <today's date YYYY-MM-DD>
- <one bullet per backend-relevant change, specific and actionable>

If nothing in the diff affects the backend, do nothing — do not create or touch backend.md.
